---
title: "Results"
---

This chapter's structure depends entirely on your methodology + research
question. Replace the placeholder sections below with sections appropriate
to your work.

## (Section 1)

(Replace this section.)

## (Section 2)

(Replace this section.)

## Summary of findings

(A short summary paragraph at the end of the results chapter — easy for
your committee to skim. Lead with the most important findings.)
